chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-679 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on /objection. 2.For hearing of CMA 2817/23 3.For hearing of main case. 13-03-2024 Mr. Muhammad Qayoom Arain, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, D.A.G. Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate holds brief on behalf of Mr. Ghulam Abbas Akhtar, Advocate for respondents No.2&3. ***** Learned counsel for petitioner does not press this petition for want of instructions, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
